title: State Water and Sanitation Mission Apex Committee Discusses JJM 2.0 Roadmap
content:
154/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June, 2026:This afternoon, the State Water and Sanitation Mission Apex Committee held a meeting at the Chief Secretary Conference Hall, MINECO, under the chairmanship of Chief Secretary Shri Khilli Ram Meena. Through video conferencing, the committee members interacted with Shri D. Senthil Pandiyan and Smt. Swati Meena Naik, Joint Secretaries of the National Jal Jeevan Mission, and discussed the progress of works being implemented in Mizoram under the Jal Jeevan Mission (JJM) scheme as well as the roadmap for JJM 2.0.

Shri D. Senthil Pandiyan briefed the committee members on the objectives and framework of JJM 2.0. He stated that JJM 2.0 not only focused on asset creation but also emphasizes sustainability, reliability of services, timely completion of projects, governance reforms, and greater public participation.

Addressing the attendees, Chief Secretary Shri Khilli Ram Meena also emphasized the importance of strong coordination and cooperation among various departments to ensure the successful implementation of JJM 2.0 in Mizoram.

Following the extension of the Jal Jeevan Mission up to December 2028, the Government of Mizoram and the Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation under the Ministry of Jal Shakti signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) on May 6, 2026, to implement Jal Jeevan Mission 2.0. The Comprehensive Implementation and Reform Plan (CIRP) for implementing JJM 2.0 scheme in Mizoram was approved during today's meeting.

Attachment

title: Excise Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar hovin Mizorama khuh damdawi hluar chungchang ngaihtuah
content:
919/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June 2026:Vawiin chawhnu dar 3:00 khan Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar, Minister of State, Excise & Narcotics Departments hovin MINECO-a a office chamber-ah Excise & Narcotics Department, Home Department, Food & Drugs Administration (FDA) leh Central YMA aiawhten Ruihhlo Do Meeting an nei a, tunhnaia thalai zinga khuh damdawi hluar chho zela hmalak dan tur an ngaihtuah.

Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan tunhnaiah a bikin thalai lamah khuh damdawi ruih a hluar chu thil ngaihmawhawm tak a nih thu a sawi a. Khuh damdawi hi naupang zawkten zu leh damdawi dang an khawihna kailawn langsar tak a ni, tiin, ruihhlo dang leh damdawi hlauhawm tak tak kan vei rualin, khuh damdawi zalen lutuk hi engtinnge kan tihreh theih ang tih hi kan ngaihtuah a ngai a ni, a ti. Khawvel hmun dangah pawh uluk taka khuahkhirhna kalpui a ni a, Mizoramah a zalen em em mai chu thil nih dan tur a ni lo tiin a sawi.

He meeting-ah hian report hrang hrang ngaihthlak niin tunhnaiah a bikin thalai zingah khuh damdawi ruih a zual thu ngaihthlak a ni a. Zirlai naupang atanga sakhaw rawngbawltu thlenga a nghawng avangin hmalak dan tur ngaihtuah a tul hle tih sawi a ni.

Tun dinhmuna khuh damdawi hluar dan leh chu miin harsatna a thlen te, hma la tura dan tlawhchhan theihte zirchianna mumal tak neih ni se tih a ni a. Harsatna hrang hrang ching fel tura hmalak dan tur te buatsaih a, mapping mumal tak lo ti turin Home Department, Excise & Narcotics Department, FDA leh Central YMA aiawh pakhat theuh ruat an ni a. An zirchiannate chu meeting leh hunah thlirho a, hmalak chhunzawm dan ngaihtuah tur a ni ang.

Central YMA in damdawi zuarte hnenah prescription tel lova khuh damdawi hralh lo turin ngenna siam ni se, tiin meeting chuan a rel bawk a. Branch tin huamchhunga damdawi dawrte in report turin ngen ni se, tih a ni bawk.

Hmalak chhunzawm dan ngaihtuah turin a ranglama meeting leh ni se, meeting leh hunah hian Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs bakah Mizoram Chemist and Druggist Association te sawm ve ni se, tiin meeting-ah hian an rel a ni.

Meeting-ah hian Home Secretary Pu Vanlalmawia, Excise & Narcotics Secretary Pu C. Lalruaia, Excise Commissioner Pu Z. Lalhmangaiha te bakah Home Department, Excise Department, FDA hotute leh Central YMA aiawhte an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: State Water and Sanitation Mission Apex Committee an thukhawm
content:
918/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena kaihhruaiin State Water and Sanitation Mission Apex Committee chu Chief Secretary Conference Hall, MINECO-ah an thukhawm a. Pu D. Senthil Pandiyan leh Pi Swati Meena Naik, National Jal Jeevan Mission Joint Secretary-te nen biakhmuhtheihna (Video conferencing) hmanga inbiain sawrkar laipui scheme Jal Jeevan Mission(JJM) hnuaia Mizoram-a hnathawh kal mekte leh JJM 2.0 hnuaia an hmachhawp te an sawiho a ni.

Pu Senthil Pandiyan chuan thutkhawma tel te hnenah JJM 2.0 thiltum leh nihphungte a hrilhfiah a. JJM 2.0 hian thil hlu siam (asset creation) chauh ni lovin, a tlona te, a rintlakna te, hnathawh turte hun taka zawh thin te, inrelbawlna siamṭhat (governance reforms) te leh mipuite tel vena (public participation)te a tum zawk thu a sawi a ni.

Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena pawhin JJM 2.0 scheme a hlawhtlin theih nan department hrang hrangte thawhhona tha neih a pawimawh thu a sawi a ni.

Jal Jeevan Mission chu December 2028 thleng pawhsei a nih tak avangin Mizoram sorkar leh Ministry of Jal Shakti, Department of Drinking Water & Sanitation te chuan May ni 6, 2026 khan Jal Jeevan Mission 2.0 kalpuina tura inremna thuthlung (Memorandum of Understanding) an ziak a. Mizoram-ah JJM 2.0 scheme kalpui nana Comprehensive Implementation and Reform Plan (CIRP) chu vawiin thutkhawmah pawm a ni.

Attachment

title: Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Minister Lays Foundation Stone for X-Band Doppler Weather Radar
content:
153/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June 2026:Disaster Management & Rehabilitation (DM&R) Minister Prof. Lalnilawma virtually laid the foundation stone for the ‘X-Band Doppler Weather Radar’ organized by the Indian Meteorological Department (IMD), Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India, at MINECO Conference Hall Number 1 today.

Prof. Lalnilawma expressed his pleasure in participating in this memorable event, stating that while Mizoram is a beautiful place, it is also highly prone to disasters, making weather forecasting equipment one of its most essential needs. He noted that in modern times, countries compete through information, and those with more data become more powerful. Consequently, this radar system will enable Mizoram to access more detailed weather forecasts (information), allowing for better preparedness and potentially saving many lives.

Speaking on the occasion, Mr. Udit Prakash Rai, Secretary of DM&R, emphasized that disaster prevention and response require cooperation across various agencies rather than being the responsibility of a single department. He also urged the IMD to provide accurate and clear weather reports.

This radar will be utilized for weather forecasting in the Northeast region and will be beneficial for disaster prevention, farmers, and air travelers.

The foundation-laying ceremony was attended by Dr. Kripan Ghosh, Head of the Regional Meteorological Centre (RMC) Guwahati, and Mr. Suheer Kumar Dwivedi, Director of IMD Mizoram. Dr. Mrutyunjay Mohapatra, Director General of Meteorology, IMD, also participated via video conferencing.

Attachment

title: Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Minister in X-Band Doppler Weather Radar Lungphum a Phum
content:
917/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June 2026:Disaster Management & Rehabilitation (DM&R) Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan vawiin khan MINECO Conference Hall Number 1 ah Indian Meteorological Department (IMD), Ministry of Earth Sciences, Government of India buatsaih, ‘X-Band Doppler Weather Radar’ lungphum a phum.

Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan vawiin chu ni chhinchhiah tlak tak a nih thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu hmun nuam tak a nih piah lamah chhiatrupna thlen nasatna a nih avangin khaw chin hriat lawkna khawl chu a mamawh ber te zinga mi a ni, a ti. Tunlaiah information hmangin ram hrang hrang an intlansiaknaah information ngah ramte chu ram chak an ni zel a, chuvang chuan Mizoram pawhin he radar system hmang hian khaw chin hrilhlawkna (information) chipchiar zawk a nei thei ang a, inpuahchahna tha zawk neiin nunna tam zawk chhan a nih phah ngei a beisei thu a sawi.

Pu Udit Prakah Rai, DM&R Secretary pawhin thu sawiin, khuarel chhiatna lo thlena invenna leh hmalakna chu department pakhat mai ni lovin agency hrang hrang te thawhona a pawimawh thu sawiin, IMD chu khawchin dik leh fiah tak report thin turin a ngen a ni.

He radar hi North-east region-ah khaw chin hriatlawkna atana hman tur niin, khuarel chhiatna laka invenna kawngah te, kut hnathawk te leh thlawhnaa zin veivak te tana hman tangkai theih tur a ni.

Doordarshan Campus Durtlang Aizawlah he khawl hi bun tur a ni a. Cheng vaibelchhe 10 senna tur he project hi June ni 1, 2026 khan thawh tan niin, October ni 9, 2026 ah zawhfel hman tum a ni.

Lungphum phumna inkhawmah hian Dr. Kripan Ghosh, Regional Meteorological Centre (RMC) Guwahati-Head leh Pu Suheer Kumar Dwivedi, IMD Mizoram Director an tel a, Dr. Mrutyunjay Mohapatra IMD Director General of Meteorology pawh video conferencing hmangin a tel bawk.

Attachment

title: Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) in ‘Community Recreation Centre at Venghnuai, Aizawl’ leh ‘Directorate of Economics & Statistics Building at MINECO, Aizawl’ endik
content:
916/2026-2027

Dated 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Mizoram State Project Monitoring Committee (MSPMC) chu Inspection Team hnih (2) ah insiamin heng project pahnih (2) thawh mek laite chu endikin a hmunah an kal.Heng project pahnih chanchin tlangpui chu hetiang hi a ni:

A. Community Recreation Centre, Venghnuai, Aizawl: He hna hi October, 2025 ah thawh tan niin, October, 2027 chhunga zawh tur a ni a. Hemi chhung hian hna hi thawh zawh ngei tum a ni. SASCI sum hmangin cheng vaibelchhe sawm (10.00 Crore) senga sak mek a ni a. UD&PA Department hnuaiah Aizawl Smart City Ltd. ten M/S Sky Builders, Zemabawk North, Aizawl (Contractor) ah hmangin an thawk a ni. He hna hi thla sawmhnih pali (24 months) chhunga sak zawh tura contract agreement ziah a ni. MSPMC team ten an endik lai hian hna zaah sawmnga paruk (56%) thawh zawh tawh a ni a. Contractor hnenah hian a hnathawh tawh bill cheng vaibelchhe thum (3.00 Crore) zet (42%) pek tawh a ni a. Hna hi thawh mek a ni.

B. Directorate of Economics & Statistics Building, MINECO: He hna hi kum 2014 a NECS in ‘turnkey basis’ a an thawh tawh, ban leh beam te specification tling lo avanga chak lo thawm that hna thawh mek a ni a. Tunah hian SASCI 2024-25 sum cheng nuai zahnih pasarih (Rs. 2.07 Crore) sengin thawm that hna ‘Retro-fitting’ thawh mek a ni a. He ‘Retro-fitting’ hna hi Mizoram PWD ten enkawlin contractor chu CB Engineering, Venghlui, Aizawl a ni. He hna hi thla sawmpahnih (12 months) chhunga thawk zo turin agreement ziah a ni a. MSPMC team ten an endik lai hian hna zaah sawm sarih panga (75%) thawh zawh tawh a ni a. Contractor hnena pawisa pek tawh chu cheng nuai za (Rs. 100.00 lakhs) vel a ni. He hna hi a hmunin a zir loh avangin a tira hun tiam chhunga zawh hman a ni dawn lova. 9th September, 2026 hma ngeia zawh tum a ni.

Heng hnathawh kal lai mekte hi a hmunah uluk taka endik an ni a. He hna endik hona ah hian hnathawh kal lai meka harsatna awmte sawi hovin, hna quality tha tak neih dan turte leh a rang thei ang bera zawh theih dan turte sawi ho a ni.

Attachment

915/2026-2027

title: KHAWZAWLAH VAF LEH ELC-TE TAN SIR 2026 CHUNGCHANGAH TRAINING BUATSAIH A NI
content:
914/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 9th June, 2026: Vawiin khan Khawzawla Voter Awareness Forum (VAF) leh Electoral Literacy Club (ELC) Convener-te tan SIR 2026 chungchang inzirtirna hun BDO Office-ah buatsaih a ni a.

He hun hi BDO Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha, Election Officer ni bawk chuan kaihruaiin, Enumeration Form fill up dan te, ECINET App hmanga 2005 Electoral Roll-a mahni details en dan leh Form thehluh dan te a sawi a. Kalkhawmte chu SIR ngaipawimawha Enumeration Form thehlut ngei turin leh an thawhpui, an chhungte leh thiante hrilhhretu leh kaihruaitu a tang turin a chah.

Vawiin training-ah hian SDC Pu R. Lalrinhlua, District Level Master Trainer ni bawk chuan SIR chungchang sawifiahna leh sawizauna hun a hmang a. DIPRO Pi Lalchungnungi Lakher, District Media Nodal Officer ni bawk chuan SIR chungchang awareness neih dan tur hrang hrang sawina hun a hmang bawk.

title: KHAWZAWLAH PLUCK AND PAY FESTIVAL HMAN DAN TUR REL
content:
913/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Khawzawlah Pluck and Pay Festival hman dan tur relin Organizing Committee chu an Chairman, Khawzawl Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an thukhawm.

Bawrhsap Pu K. Vanlalthiana chuan Pluck and Pay festival chu tourism lama Khawzawl district tihhmasawnna atan hmalakna pawimawh tak a nih thu a sawi a. He festival hi Khawzawl district chhunga thlai leh thei thar chhuahte tihlar nan leh kuthnathawkte tana awlsam zawka an thlai leh thei tharte an hralh theihna tura hmalakna tha tak a nih thu a sawi a. Bawrhsap chuan hetiang hmalaknaah hian kuthnathawkte chu hlawkna teltu ber ni se a duh thu leh an dinhmun chawikanna kawngah nasa taka a puih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

Pluck and Pay Festival hi Tourism Department hmalakna hnuaia kalpui tur niin, Khawzawl district chhunga khualzin hipna leh agro-tourism tihlarna tura buatsaih tum a ni a. He festival chhung hian Khawzawl district chhunga khaw thlan bika thei leh thlai huanahte a duh apiang tan thlai leh thei lawh theih a ni dawn a, stall hrang hrangah thlai leh thei tharchhuah zawrhna leh khualzinte tana intihhlimna hrang hrang buatsaiha kalpui tum a ni a. July kar tawpa buatsaih tura rel niin, Festival neihna tur ni leh hmun hi Organizing Committee-in an rel leh dawn a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Tourism Officer Pi C. Ramsangzuali, Addl DC Pu K. Zorammuana, SDO Pu Chandrakant Bagoria, DHO Pu Henry Lalremruata Varte, DAO Pi Lallawmzuali, BDO Pu Timothy R. Lalhmangaiha leh official dangte an tel a. Khaw hrang hranga thlai leh thei pawl hotute an tel bawk a ni.

title: COOPERATION MINISTER-IN MIZOFED ANNUAL GENERAL ASSEMBLY VAWI 28-NA HMANPUI
content:
912/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 9th June 2026:Vawiin khan Cooperation Department changtu Minister Pu P.C. Vanlalruata chuan MIZOFED (Mizoram State Cooperative Marketing and Consumers Federation Ltd.) Annual General Assembly vawi 28-na Dawrpui Multipurpose Centre-a an hmanna chu khuallian niin a telpui.

Cooperation Minister chuan MIZOFED inkhawmpuilian vawi 28-na a hmanpui thei chu lawmawm a ti a. Kum 2025-26 chhunga MIZOFED annual report tarlan anga cheng ₹9,77,06,787.15 (provisional) lai mai hlawkna (net profit) an tel thei chu hma an sawnzia tilangtu a ni, a ti a. Minister chuan sawrkarin kuthnathawkte a ngaihpawimawhzia sawiin, sawrkar flagship policy kalpui mekte mila Cooperative Society-te nen thawhhona tha zawk an neih theih a beisei a, heng atan hian sawrkar chuan Society-te chu thawhpuia chawikan theihna apianga chawikan a inhuam reng thu a sawi bawk.

He programme-ah hian Mizoram Cooperative Societies-a Registrar Pu John L.T. Sanga pawhin thu a sawi a. Cooperative Society-te chu chhawmdawl leh chawikan a pawimawh a, India state danga Cooperative Society-te changtlunzia leh an hlawkna tel dan entawnin Mizoram pawh kan inzir ve thei, a ti a. MIZOFED pawh hmasawn zel turin a duhsak thu leh an output (dehchhuah) tipung zela Mizoram tan rawngbawl zel turin Pu John L.T.Sanga chuan a chah a ni.

MIZOFED hi Marketing & Consumer Federation a nih angin sumdawnna a khawih ber a, tuna sumdawnna lama a hma lakna lian deuh hlawm thuma then theih te chu:

1. Petroleum Oil Lubricants (POL)2. Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG)3. Essential Commodities & Consumer Goods (E&C)

He hunah hian kum 2025-26 chhunga MIZOFED sumdawnna hlep leh hloh dinhmun Head Office-in a chhut chhuah (la audit loh) chu tarlan niin cheng ₹9,77,06,787.15 lalut anga chhut a ni.

Vawiin programme-ah hian MIZOFED Chairman Pu K.Rothangpuia chuan chairman niin inkhawm hi a kaihruai a, MIZOFED Managing Director Pu Lalhruaitluanga chuan Annual Report (2025-26) pein, MIZOFED Vice-chairman Pu Vunghnuna chuan lawmthu sawina neiin inkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhai District Election Officer-in chanchinbu mite a kawm
content:
911/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 9th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Chamber, Champhaiah District Election Officer (DEO) Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan chanchinbu mite kawmin Special Intensive Revision (SIR) hnuaia hmalakna hrang hrang te a sawi.

Champhai DEO Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan SIR hi Champhai District-ah chuan chak takin a kal mek a, May ni 30 atang khan Enumeration Form semchhuah tan niin Champhai hnuaia Assembly Constituency pathum - 23-Champhai North, 24-Champhai South leh 25-East Tuipuia electoral roll-a hming chuang zawng zawng hnenah sem chhuah tawh a ni tih a sawi a, Booth Level Officer (BLO) te tha takin an thawh avangin an fakawm hle a ni tih a sawi. BLO te hian Enumeration Form hi an khawn khawm mek a, heng hi digitization leh verification tih mek niin 40,688 digitize tawh a ni a, zaa 68.77 (68.77%) zawh tawh niin district-a zo hmasa ber a ni. Polling Station siamrem pawh kalpui tum a ni bawk a, heng zawng zawng hi hun bi ral hmaa zawh hman vek an in beisei thu a sawi bawk. Tun dinhmunah Champhai District-a booth pasarih - Pamchung, Keifangtlang, Chhungte, Hruaikawn, New Hruaikawn, Bulfekzawl leh Sazep ah te chuan Enumeration Form sem chhuah, lak khawm leh digitize hna chu an zo vek tawh a, hemi kawngah hian Mizoram puma a thawk tha ber an ni tih a sawi bawk. SIR hnathawhna hrang hrangah Election Officer te, Electoral Registration Officer te, Assistant Electoral Registration Officer te, Election Branch-a thawk te, BLO te, Addl. BLO te leh Booth Level Standing Committee te an thawhrimna leh an inpeknaah lawmthu a sawi a, chanchinbu mite pawh tha taka an puanzar zel avanga lawmthu sawiin hna dang tih leh tur pawh tha taka lo puanzar sak turin a ngen bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Addl. DC Pu Lalbiakfela, Election Officer Pu Ngulzathuama, SDO (Sadar) Dr. Peter Malsawmtluanga, SDC Pu Lalchhuanawma Ralte an tel a, Mizoram Journalists Association member thahnem tak an tel bawk.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah Voter Awareness Forum chungchang inzirtirna buatsaih
content:
910/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 9th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah Special Intensive Revision (SIR) kal meka tih tur tul hrang hrang inhrilhhriat nana buatsaih Voter Awareness Forum (VAF) chungchang inzirtirna Champhai pisa hrang hrang tan buatsaih a ni.

He hun hawn nan Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan thu sawiin inthlanna thil reng reng hi chu khua leh tui tha tan chuan ngaih pawimawh ngei ngei tur a ni tih a sawi a. Electoral Roll thara a tel thei zawng zawng an tel ngei theih nan VAF hnuaia ruat te chuan Enumeration Form dahkhah dan leh thehluh dan te hriat kim bakah midang thiam lo te zirtir tur an ni tih a sawi a, he training hi hlawk taka hmang tur leh thil pawimawh hriat reng tum turin a chah. Heng an thil zir te hi mahni thawhpui te, chhungte leh thiante hnena zirtir chhawng tha turin a chah bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Election Officer Pu Ngulzathuama leh Election Branch atangin Kawlhmingliani leh J. Lalthanmawia te'n SIR chungchang tlangpui te, form thehluh hun bi te, form thehluh zawha sawiselna emaw lungawilohna sawi hun tur te leh thil tul dang hrang hrang an zirtir a. Enumeration Form leh Declaration Form dahkhah dan chipchiar takin an sawifiah bawk a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hlawkthlak tak hman bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: Champhaiah STOP DIARRHOEA Campaign kalpui dan tur sawi ho
content:
909/2026-2027

Dated Champhai, 9th June 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Champhaiah Champhai Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hovin kawthalo laka invenna beihpui, STOP DIARRHOEA Campaign kalpui dan tur sawi ho a ni.

He hunah hian Dy. Chief Medical Officer (CMO) chuan STOP DIARRHOEA Campaign an kalpui chhan te leh a thil tum te a sawi a, National Health Mission (NHM) hnuaia District Programme Manager Pi C. Lalramengi'n STOP DIARRHOEA Campaign 2026 chungchang hriattur hrang hrang PowerPoint presentation hmangin a sawi bawk. Tunkum hian June ni 16-ah he campaign hawnna neih a ni ang a, Govt. Primary School-I ah neih tum a ni. He campaign thupui chu "Kawthalo ven nan faina leh ORS a pawimawh" tih a ni a, inbuatsaihna hun (preparatory phase) hi June ni 1 atanga ni 15 a ni ang a, a hnathawh hun (implementation phase) hi June ni 16 atanga July ni 31 thleng a ni ang. Hemi hun chhung hian naupang kum 5 hnuai lam hnenah ORS leh zinc tablet pekchhuah te, Anganwadi centre, Health & Wellness Centre leh hmun dang dangah ORS leh zinc tablet lak theihna hmun siam te tum a ni. Hemi bakah hian YMA te, MHIP te leh sawrkar lamin uar takin faina pawimawh zia leh in vawn fai dan te an zirtirin an au chhuah pui bawk ang.

Chairman Pu Mohammad Aaquib chuan kawthalo (diarrhoea) in naupang tam tak tana harsatna a thlen tih hriat a tul tih a sawi a, he campaign hi tha taka kalpui a nih theih nan chanvo nei te chu theihtawp chhuah turin a chah a, danglamna an siam theih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk.

He hunah hian UD&PA department, Education department leh khawtlang hruaitu pawimawh te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM CHHUNGA NATIONAL HIGHWAY ZAWNG ZAWNGAH KAWNGPUI HIMNA TUR THUPEK CHHUAH A NI
content:
908/2026-2027

Kolasib, 9th June, 2026:Hon'ble Supreme Court of India-in Suo Moto Writ Petition (Civil) No.9 of 2025, ni 13.04.2026 a thuchhuak a siam bawhzuiin leh, 'The Control of National Highways (Land & Traffic) Act 2002' leh 'Gazette of India Extraordinary 2019' in thuneihna a pek angin, Commissioner & Secretary, Public Works Department, Highway Administrator/Authority ni bawk chuan Mizoram chhunga National Highway zawng zawngah a hnuaia tarlan te hi thu leh awm hma chu khauh taka zawm nghal turin thupek a chhuah:

1. Lirthei lian (heavy vehicles) emaw sumdawnna lirthei (commercial vehicles) reng reng National Highway kawngpuiah leh a sirah (paved shoulder) te  parking emaw din khap tlat a ni. An din theihna tura ruat bik hmun (designated bay, lay-bye emaw wayside amenity) ah chauh an ding/chawl tur a ni.

2. National Highway kawng huam chhung  ah dhaba thar, chaw ei dawr emaw sumdawnna hmun/in (commercial structure) reng reng sak thar emaw siam thar chu tun atang hian khap nghal tlat a ni.

3.  PWD atanga phalna (clearance) hmu hmasa lovin, department, thuneitu emaw tualchhung thuneitu (local body) ten Highway Safety Zone (kawngpui himna atana huamchin siam) chhunga hmun/hmunhma reng reng atan license thar, No Objection Certificate (NOC) emaw sumdawn phalna (trade approval) an pe chhuak tur a ni lova, a hlui pawh an renew sak tur a ni lo. Hetiang atana license pe chhuak tawhte pawh ni 30 chhungin endik (review) tha leh vek tur a ni.

4. National Highway tlan tlangna district tinah, Supreme Court Committee on Road Safety in ni 13.05.2026 a thupek a chhuah atanga ni 15 chhungin, a kaihhnawih Deputy Commissioner/District Magistrate ten District Highway Safety Task Force an din tur a ni.

5. State Police leh Transport Department thawktute tangkawpin National Highway viltu tur bik (Dedicated Highway Surveillance Teams) siamin uluk takin kawngpui hi an fangkual (patrol) thin tur a ni a, heng duty fangkual lirtheite inkar hlat zawng hi 50 Km aia hla a ni tur a ni lo.

title: KOLASIBAH STOP DIARRHOEA CAMPAIGN KALPUI DAN TUR SAWI HOVIN STEERING COMMITTEE AN THUKHAWM
content:
907/2026-2027

Kolasib, 9th June, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Sr. Chief Medical Officer (CMO) Office Chamber, Kolasib-ah Ministry of Health & Family Welfare hnuaia ruahmanna, India ram pum huapa naupangte zinga kawthalo (diarrhoea) vanga thihna pumpelhna tura beihpui thlakna 'STOP Diarrhoea Campaign 2026' kalpui dan tur chungchangah Kolasib District Steering Committee te an thukhawm.

He hun hi Dr. R.K. Lalthlamuana, Sr. CMO Kolasib chuan a kaihruai a , thu sawiin, "Kawthalo ven nan faina leh Zinc a pawimawh" tih thupui hmanga beihpui thlak a nih thu a tarlang a. Kolasib District chhungah naupang kawthalo vei leh he natna vanga thi an awm lohna turin department hrang hrangte thawhhona a pawimawh hle a ni, a ti. Hriselna chu faina leh thianghlimna te, tui thianghlim in tur hnianghnar neih te leh ei tur tha nen a inzawm tlat avangin, mipuite leh line department hrang hrangte tangrual chauhvin he hmalakna hi hlawhtling takin a kalpui theih a ni, a ti bawk.

STOP Diarrhoea Campaign hi kumin June ni 16 atanga July ni 31, 2026 chhung hian kalpui tur a ni a. He hun chhung hian Health & Family Welfare, Women & Child Development, Education, PHE leh Rural Development department te tanghovin Kolasib District chhunga Anganwadi Centre, sikul leh damdawi in hrang hrangah te 'ORS & Zinc Corner' siam a ni ang. Naupangte leh anmahni enkawltute hnenah kawthalo ven dan leh enkawl dan te, tui thianghlim in pawimawhna, kut sil fai dan leh faina chungchang inzirtirna uar taka kalpui a ni dawn a ni. Hei bakah hian Block Level leh Primary Health Centre (PHC) a thawk te tan Orientation Training neih tura ruahmanna siam a ni bawk.

Kumin STOP Diarrhoea Campaign hawnna (District Launch) hi June ni 16, 2026 khian District Hospital, Kolasib-ah neih tura ruahman a ni a. Report-a a lan danin, he beihpui thlak chhung hian Kolasib District-a khaw 70 chhunga naupang kum 5 hnuai lam mi 7,521 te chu bitum (target) niin, an hnenah hian ORS packet 2 zel leh Zinc tablet mum 14 zel sem tura ruahman a ni.

Attachment

title: Sports Minister-in National Level Tournament Medalist-te lawmpuina hun a hmanpui
content:
906/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl the 9th June 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan Sports & Youth Services Minister Pu Lalnghinglova Hmar chuan MSSC Conference Hall, Hawla Indoor Stadium, Aizawlah tun hnaia India ram pum huapa Arm Wrestling leh Muaythai inelnaa lawmman la te lawmpuina hun a hmanpui.

Minister chuan Mizoram tihmingthatute chu a lawmpui em em thu a sawi a. Infiammite chu an hmazawn theuhah a tha ber thleng thei tura an rilru leh an taksa buatsaih turin a fuih bawk. Mizoram sawrkarin infiammite hmasawnna turin ruahmanna a siam mek zel a. An thiamna leh theihnate hmanga Mizoram chawimawitute chu lawmthu a hrilh bawk a ni.

Minister hian Contact Sports-te hmasawnnan Centre of Excellence of Boxing chu ITI-ah din tum a nih thu a sawi a. Ministry of DoNER atangin Administrative Approval and Financial Sanction (AFS) cheng vaibelchhe 38.39 sanction a nih tawh thu sawiin, infiammite tan hmasawnna thlenna tur a nih ngei a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

He hunah hian Mizoram Arm Wrestling Association Finance Secretary Pu Lalremsiaman report pein 4th PAFI National Arm Wrestling Championship 2026, 29th May - 2nd June, 2026 a Gandhinagar, Gujarat-a neihah Mizoramin Medal 35 - Gold 14, Silver 13 leh Bronze 8 an lak thu a sawi a. Muaythai Association of Mizoram Treasurer Pu V Lalmuankima pawhin 7th Youth National Muaythai Championship 2026, 1st - 4th June, 2026-a Haldwani, Uttarakhand-a neihah Mizoramin medal 20 - Gold 9, Silver 8 leh Bronze 3 an lak thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Lawmpuina inkhawm hi Pu Henry C Lalrawnkima, MSSC Secretary in a kaihruai a. Infiammite leh Mizoram Arm Wrestling Association leh Muaythai Association of Mizoram hruaitute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Lawngtlai District Screening Committee (DSC) chungchanga i/c Medical Superintendent, District Hospital thuchhuah
content:
905/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9th June 2026:Lawngtlai District Screening Committee (DSC) chungchangah i/c Medical Superintendent, District Hospital chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thuchhuah a siam.

OFFICE ORDER - 21/2026

District Hospital Lawngtlai ah hian damlo refer chungchang ah District Screening Committee (DSC) din fel tawh a ni a. Screening Committee te hian phai a damlo refer ngai te chu Aizawl leh Lunglei Medical Board a kal ngai tawh lovin Video Conference kaltlangin refer theih a ni tawh dawn a ni tih mipuite kan in hriattir e. Hriatchian duh nei chuan District Medical Superintendent Office Lawngtlai ah Office hun chhung in zawh fiah theih a ni e.

District Screening Committee thut hun - Thawhlehni leh Zirtawpni.

(DR. PAUL LALCHUNGNUNGA)i/c District Medical SuperintendentDistrict Hospital Lawngtlai

title: AH&VETY DEPARTMENT, MzSRLM LEH SIRD & PR TANGKAWP BUATSAIHIN A-HELP 10th BATCH TRAINING PROGRAMME HAWN A NI
content:
904/2026-2027

Aizawl dated 9th June 2026:A-HELP (Accredited Agent for Health and Extension of Livestock Production), ran hrisel zawk a enkawl thei tura hmeichhiate buatsaihna Traning tum 10-na chu Animal Husbandry & Veterinary Department, Mizoram State Rural Livelihood Mission (MzSRLM) leh State Institute of Rural Development & Panchayati Raj tangkawp chuan a buatsaih a. He traning hi ni 17 awh tur niin, SIRD & PR, Durtlang ah khaw hrang hrang atanga thlanchhuah hmeichhia mi 25-te chu ran hrisel zawk neih theihna atan mithiam ten zirtirna an pe dawn a ni. A-HELP Training tum 10-na hawnna hun hi Dr. Lalramngheta, Deputy Director, AH&Vety chuan kaihruaiin Dr. Lalrotluanga Sailo, Director chuan Training hawnna hun a hmang a . Dr. C. Khawlthangmawia, Jt. Director chuan lawmthu sawina hun a hmang bawk a ni.

Dr. Lalrotluanga, Director, AH & Vety Department chuan mizo hmeichhiate chu thiamna leh theihna tangkai tak nen thuam an nih chuan, chhungkaw tihmasawn tura taima leh tumruh an nih thu a sawi a. Ran enkawlna kawngah pawh thiamna tangkai leh hmanrua an mamawh angte pek an nih chuan, chhungkua leh khawtlanga sa hrisel intodelhna kawngah hmanraw tangkai tak an nih theih thu a sawi a. Chutiang hmasawnna thlentu ni tur chuan AH&Vety, MzSRLM leh SIRD & PR tangkawp buatsaih, A-HELP Training Programme chu tangkai taka hmang turin kalkhawmte a chah a ni.

Training hawnna-ah hian Dr. Lalhruaitluangi Sailo, Sr. Core Faculty, SIRD&PR, Training Manager chuan Training chhunga hriattur pawimawh a sawi a, He training-ah hian Serchhip, E. Lungdar, Zawlnuam, Tlangnuam, Khawbung, Lungsen, Tlabung, Bunghmun RD Block-te atanga MzSRLM hnuaia Livestock Community Resource Persons thlan bik mi 25 te training pek an ni ang, AH & Vety Dept leh MzSRLM atang a Master Trainers leh External Facilitator-ten zirtirna hi an pe dawn a ni. Ran enkawlna atana an hman tangkai tur – A-Help Kit, training-a kalte hi pek vek an ni.

Attachment

title: CHIEF MINISTER-IN SERCHHIPAH: ALIMCO HMANRAW SEMNA A TELPUI A, DISTRICT PLAN & PROJECT MONITORING SYSTEM A HAWNG A, KAWNGPUI THAR 2 LEH LAND IMPROVEMENT A HAWNG A, MLA CUP FINAL A HMANPUI BAWK
content:
903/2026-2027

"Hun tiam ral hmaa quality tha taka hna thawk zo thei Evergreen Construction & Consultancy chungah kan lawm a. Hetiang Firm hi chawimawi ang u" _ Chief Minister.

Serchhip, the 9th June 2026:Chief Minister Pu Lalduhoma chuan vawiin khan a bial Serchhip a tlawh a, Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India (ALIMCO) ten a mamawhtu mi 211 hnena an nitin hmanraw mamawh 1427 an semna a telpui a, Deputy Commissioner leh NIC te tangkawpin an siam District Plan & Project Monitoring System thar a hawng a, Bawngchawm Paragliding Take-Off tlang panna kawngpui tihzauh leh PCC thar te, Zawlpui leh a chhehvel zau inkalpawhna kawngpui tihzau leh PCC tharte a hawng bawk a. Tlai lamah Serchhip bial MLA Cup Final Programme a hmanpui bawk a ni.

A hmasa berah Chief Minister hian Serchhip DC Conference Hall-ah Serchhip DC leh ALIMCO tangkawp ten an kalpui, pianphunga rualbanlo te, ramtuileilo leh kum upa, an chetvelna atana ALIMCO hmanraw siam mamawhtu mi 211 te hnena bungraw hlanna a telpui a. Hmanraw thar dawngtute lawmpuiin, heng an mamawh thilte an dawn theih nana hma latu ALIMCO leh DC chungah lawmthu a sawi.

Chief Minister chuan, kan duhthlanna vang ni lovin, kan pianpui tisa lama kim lohna emaw harsatna kan nei thei a, fuke kim biaia kan pian hnu pawhin eng emaw vanduaina avangin kan taksaah kim lo leh fel lo a awm thei bawk a. Tin, kan kum a lo tam tak avangin hmanrua eng emaw nena kan nun a tul chang a awm thei bawk a. Chutiang kara kan awm chuan kan harsatna min sutkiansak thei hmanrua kha an lo pawimawh hle thin. Chutiang mite mamawh hmanraw siamtu tur chu sorkar laipui chuan kum 1972 khan ALIMCO hi a din a, an hmanraw mamawh a siamsak a. Mizoramah pawh office rawn hawngin tha takin hma an la a. Vawiinah Serchhip district khaw hrang hranga miten an zar kan zo ta a ni. An thil semte hi a mamawhtute tan a hlut em avangin Mizoram pumpui tuam chhuakin hma la thei se ka duh hle a. DC zawng zawng ten lo ngaihven se a thain ka hria, a ti.

Vawiin hian Serchhip district chhunga Disabled person mi 28 leh kum lama upa, mi 183, an vaiin mi 211 hnenah hmanraw chi hrang hrang 1,427 zet an sem chhuak a. An hmanraw pek chhuah hlut zawng hi Rs. 19.25 Lakh hu a ni.

He mi zawh hian Serchhip DC Meeting Hall-ah Deputy Commissioner leh NIC ten an siam Serchhip District Plan & Project Monitoring System tlangzarhna a nei leh a. He system hi State Collaboration Initiatives hnuaia DARPC funded project a ni.

He hunah hian Chief Minister chuan, nikum June ni 18 khan Serchhip DC leh NIC-te tangkawpin an siam, “Vantlang Viltu” (Citizen’s Eye) kan lo hawng tawh a. Vawiinah District Plan & Project Monitoring System kan han tlangzarh leh ta a. Hetiang thil tha tak tak ngaihtuah chhuaktu kan DC leh a thawhpuite chungah lawmthu ka sawi a ni.

He system thar hian Serchhip district hmasawnna tur in thawhhona a tichak dawn a, data tharlam ber ber kan nei reng thei dawn a. Kan tangkaipui hle ang. Monitoring System tiin a hming kan han vuah a, Cooperative monitoring/Collaborative monitoring lam kha a kawk deuh berin ka ring a. Sorkar hian Convergence kan uar a, kan rawn tihbelh chho zel dawn a. DC kaihhruaina hnuaiah inhretawn vekin kal ula a, DC pawh hi thunei takin awm se kan duh a. An hmuh phak loh emaw an hriat loha Department thenkhatten hna in lo thawhte hi tha kan ti tehchiam lo. Inhriatsak tawn zela hmalakna hian Project inthuah tur a titlem a, sum leh pai, hun leh tha kan save zawk a ni, a ti.

Digital Service hian sorkar hnathawkte leh mipuite hi awlsamna min pe ve ve a. Ka mimal duhdanah phei chuan, Mizoram hi Digital State-a siam ka duh a. Mipui kan la tlem a, ziak leh chhiar thiam kan tam a, digital state nih hi chuti taka harsa niin ka ring lo. Department zawng zawng hian mipuiten an va dawr theihna chi, an Business theuh kha Digital Platform siam vek se, digital state kan ni titih der a ni mai. Private Firm rawih man a lo to a nih pawhin, sorkar anga kan thawhpui theih; ICT te, Mizoram e-Governance Society te leh NIC te kan nei a. Kan vei chuan kan tih theih vek ka ring a ni, a ti.

DC Office lama hun a hman zawhah Chief Minister hian Bawngchawm tlanga Paragliding thlawhchhuahna hmun (Take off Point) a pan a. He hmun panna kawngpui thar leh Mat kam Zawlpui leh a chhehvel zau hrang hrangte panna kawngpui siam thar hawnna hun a hmang zui a ni.

Thusawiin Chief Minister chuan, Paragliding Take off Hill panna kawngpui te, a Landing panna kawngpui, Zawlpui leh a chhehvel zau hrang hrang link road ni nghal bawk te, kan lo hawng thei ta a. Serchhip leh Mizoram tana hmasawnna lawmawm tak, lungte pakhata Sava pahnih vawmthlakna a ni.

Kan sawi tawh thin angin he lai hmun hi India ram mai ni lovin, khawvel huapa Paragliding Sports neihna hmunhma tha a tling a. Mizoram tan chuan - Pathian thilthlawnpek hmun a ni. A hlutna ang taka kan hman thiam hian min petu Pathian pawh a lawmin a rinawm.

Kan contractor, Evergreen Construction & Consultancy ten a zawh hun tura bituk thlen hma kum khat vel zet a la awmah, hun tiam zatveah an thawk zo thei hi, a lawmawm zual hle. Quality tha taka hun tiam zatvea hna thawk zo, PWD ten Letter of Appreciation an hlan awm chhun an ni hial mai thei a. Hetiang contractor hian chawimawi an phu a ni, a ti a. Hetianga a panna kawngpuite a lo that takah chuan Mizoramin International Sports Event kan huaihawt theih - Paragliding Sports hi inthlahrung lo takin kan huaihawt fo thei tawh dawn a ni.

Heng kawngte hi Paragliding ringawt hisapa siam kan ni lo va. A take-off tlang, Bawngchawm tlangah hian Bawngchawm Livestock Society ten ran an vulh a, han len khawthawnna tlaka hmunhma nuam a lo ni sa bawk a.

Zawlpui leh a chhehvel zau kawngte khu kan kuthnathawktute hmakhua ngaihtuahna vanga siam kan ni a. Kuthnathawktu chhungkaw tam takten an chhawr dawn a, kan ram economy tana thil tangkai a ni. Landing site khu chuan a zar a lo zo ve chauh zawk a ni, a ti.

Paragliding Take Off hmunhma panna kawng thui zawng hi 4.70 km niin, widening thui zawng hi 260 meter a ni. A kawng zau zawng (formation width) hi meter 5.50 a ni a, a kawng chhuat phah (pavement) zau zawng hi meter 3 a ni. A kawng chhuat phah (pavement) hi Granular Sub Base (GSB) 125 mm a chhah phah a nih hnuah Plain Cement Concrete (PCC) 100 mm M25 grade-a phah vek a ni a. Contractor Agreement Amount chu Rs. 3,45,63,310 a ni.

Mat kam zauhote inkalpawhna kawng thui zawng hi 11.20 km a ni a. A kawng zau zawng (formation width) hi meter 5.50 a ni a, a kawng chhuat phah (pavement) zau zawng hi meter 3 a zau a ni. A kawng chhuat phah (pavement) hi Granular Sub Base (GSB) 125mm a chhah phah a nih hnuah Plain Cement Concrete (PCC) 100mm M25 grade-a phah vek a ni.

Land improvement hi hmun hrang hrang – Zawlpui zau, Lumtui zau, Lau zau, Lathei zau, Zuangleng zau leh Chhiahtlang zau te an ni a, Land Improvement thawh zawng zawng zau zawng belhkhawm hi 83.03 hectare a ni a. Contractor Agreement Amount hi Rs. 9,63,30,359 a ni.

Heng hna pahnihte hi NABARD sum hmanga thawh niin contactor hi Evergreen Construction & Consultancy, Khatla, Aizawl an ni a. Hna hi a zawh hun tura bituk aia kum khat zeta hmaa a zawh avangin PWD Serchhip Division chuan Evergreen Construction & Consultancy neitu Pu J. Vanlalliana hnenah hian Letter of Appreciation an hlan a ni.

A hnuhnung berah Chief Minister hian Serchhip Sports Complex-a Serchhip MLA Cup 2026 kharna inkhawm a telpui leh a.

Thusawiin Pu Lalduhoma chuan, Football hi Mizo thalaite tana eizawn theihna remchang infiamna a ni a. Khawvel ngaihsanrawn Sports Discipline a niin tunah ngei pawh kan thalai tam takten eizawn nan an hmang mek a ni.

Kan ramah ruihhlo a hluar avangin ruihhlo laka kan inven theihna remchang tak chu Sport hi a ni a. Ruihhloa tlu lut lem lote tan pawh infiamna hi kan taksa leh rilru hriselna hnar ni. Infiamna hian kan inkarah inpawhna tha zawk min pe a, midangte nena thawhho dan min zirtir a. Hlawhtling tura kan rilru leh taksa hman kawp dan min zirtir a. Chak dan min zirtir a, chak loh dan pawh min zirtir tho va. Kawng tinrengin infiamna hian nun kawng tha min zirtir a ni.

Kan thalaite hian infiamna hi uar ila, talent nei thaten eizawnnan hmang se, chutianga ti thei lote pawhin kawng dangah sawtpui ila kan duh a. MLA Cup pawh hi infiamnain thil tha min pekte hre reng chunga buatsaih a ni, a ti a. MLA Cup-a tel VC team 23 te chungah lawmthu a sawi a ni.

Final-ah hian New Serchhip South VC leh Chanmari VC team te an intum a ni.

Attachment

title: Lungleiah Bana Kaih Phase–II hnuaia CM Special Package progress partner 8 hnenah placard leh certificate hlan a ni
content:
902/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Nikir thla ni 9:Vawiin khan Lunglei District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann hovin a hna thawh pindanah Mizoram sawrkar flagship programme, Mizoram Bana Kaih (Handholding) Scheme Phase–II hnuaia Lunglei District-a Chief Minister's Special Package ṭanpuina dawng tura thlan department pali hnuaia progress partner mi pariat hnenah an chhinchhiahna tar tur (placard) leh thuziak (certificate) hlan a ni.

Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan progress partner-te lawmpuina leh duhsakna hlanin, Bana Kaih Scheme chu Mizoram sawrkar flagship scheme a nih angin department-te leh progress partner-te pawhin a tihhlawhtlin kawngah theih tawp chhuah a ṭul tih a sawi a. Bana Kaih hnuaiah progress partner-te chu ṭanpuina sum leh loan pek an nih bakah, thlai thar hralhna ngaihtuahsak leh a man dona (support price) pek niin, hmanrua leh thiamna hmanga department-te'n vil zui a, an bana an kaih ṭhin thu a sawi a. Ṭanpuina sum inpek chu a bul ṭanna chauh a nih thu sawiin, progress partner-te chu hlawhtling ngei tura theih tawp chhuah tur leh department-te nen inpawh taka thawk ho va, an thurawn leh fuihna ngaichang thiam turin a chah.

Lunglei Sub-Deputy Commissioner Pu Lalruatfela'n hun kaihruaiin, report tlangpui a tar lang a. Bawrhsap chuan placard leh certificate chu progress partner-te kutah hlanin, official-te chuan progress partner-te tana hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang an hrilhfiah bawk.

Bana Kaih Phase–II hnuaiah hian Lunglei District-ah CM Special Package-ah progress partner thlan fel tawh pakua awmin, March thla khan Animal Husbandry & Veterinary (AH & Vety) Department hnuaia Ar Vulh (Poultry Farming)-a hma la tur Pu Lalnunmawia, Ṭawipui South hnenah ṭanpuina sum hi pek fel a lo ni tawh a. Vawiin khan mi dang pariat hnenah placard leh certificate hlan ve leh a ni.

Tun ṭuma CM Special Package dawng tur certificate hlante hi Commerce & Industries (C&I) Department hnuaiah mi pathum – R. Lalliantluanga, Chanmari-II, Lunglei (Puan Ṭhui); K. Malsawmtluangi, Ramthar, Lunglei (Beauty & Wellness Therapy) leh S. Zomuanpuii, Electric Veng, Lunglei (Chaw leh Ei Tur Sawngbawl) te; Sericulture Department hnuaiah mi pathum – Herily Lalngaihzuali, Ṭhangpui (Pangang Khawi); Vanlalhruaii, Ṭhangpui (Pangang Khawi) leh F. Ronghaka, Ṭawipui North-II (Pangang Khawi) te; AH & Vety Department hnuaiah mi pakhat – Lalrintluanga, Rangte (Vawk Vulh) leh Cooperation Department hnuaiah mi pakhat – J. Lalthlamuana, Electric Veng, Lunglei (Handicraft) te an ni.

Bana Kaih CM Special Package ṭanpuina hi ₹50,000/- niin, progress partner-te bank account-ah Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT)-a thun tura ruahman a ni a. Certificate inhlan fel hnuah hian bank kal tlangin inpek fel nghal a ni ang.

Attachment

title: KOLASIB-AH BHARAT SCOUTS & GUIDES DISTRICT PRESIDENT LEH SECRETARY THAR TE LAWMLUH AN NI
content:
901/2026-2027

Kolasib, 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan DC Conference Hall, Kolasib-ah Kolasib District Bharat Scouts & Guides (BS&G) District President thar atan Kolasib Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia leh District Secretary atan Pu Lalthawmmawia, District Sports & Youth Officer (DSYO) te chu lawmluh an ni. He lawmluhna hun hi Mizoram BS&G State Secretary Pu Lalngilneia Colney chuan  hmanpuiin, thutiam a lak tir a, BS&G Kolasib District Chief Commissioner leh District Education Officer (DEO) ni bawk, Pu Vanlalchhana chuan a kaihruai a ni.

Bharat Scouts & Guides Kolasib District President thar, Bawrhsap Pu H. Dolianbuaia chuan thu sawiin, Sports Department a alo awm tawhna atanga a tawn hriatte tarlangin, Youth Affairs lamah hian thil phurawm tak tak tih tur a tam thu a sawi a. Lengpuia Scouts & Guides hmunhma tur ruahmanna siamtu pawlah pawh a lo tel ve tawh thu a sawi bawk.

Tun hma chuan Kolasib District hi Scouts & Guides lamah a hmingtha in an lo langsar thin hle tih a sawi a, tun dinhmunah erawh hmanlai a phak ta lo deuh nia a lan thu sawiin, nasa lehzuala intuaithar kan mamawh hle a ni, a ti.

He hunah hian Kolasib District huam chhunga BS&G Commissioner hrang hrangte leh Guide Master te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER HOLDS REVIEW MEETING WITH BLOs OF LAWNGTLAI TOWN
content:
152/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9 June 2026:As part of the ongoing Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026, the District Election Officer (DEO), Lawngtlai, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga, chaired a review meeting with Booth Level Officers (BLOs) of Lawngtlai Town at the DC's Office Chamber today.

During the meeting, Shri Donny Lalruatsanga commended the dedication and commendable efforts of the BLOs in carrying out SIR 2026 activities. Reviewing the status of distribution of Enumeration Forms, he expressed satisfaction with the progress achieved so far. However, he pointed out that greater efforts are required in the collection of Enumeration Forms and the digitization process, and urged the BLOs to intensify their work in these areas.

The DEO also stressed the need for improved performance in Electors Mapping, noting that additional efforts are necessary to achieve better results. He reminded the BLOs that the Election Commission of India (ECI) attaches great importance to SIR 2026 and emphasized the need to continue working diligently to meet the Commission’s expectations. He further urged all BLOs to discharge their responsibilities with utmost sincerity and commitment.

Various issues relating to the progress made by the BLOs were discussed during the meeting. Particular attention was given to the percentage of electors mapped, where it was observed that some BLOs need to put in additional effort to improve their performance. Participants unanimously acknowledged the crucial role played by BLOs in ensuring the successful implementation of SIR 2026 and in maintaining a clean, accurate, and credible Electoral Roll. They resolved to continue working with dedication towards these objectives.

The meeting was attended by the EROs and AEROs of 36-Tuichawng (ST), 37-Lawngtlai West (ST), and 38-Lawngtlai East (ST), along with all BLOs serving within Lawngtlai Town. The meeting concluded with a vote of thanks delivered by Shri Donny Lalruatsanga.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI DISTRICT ELECTION OFFICER - IN LAWNGTLAI TOWN CHHUNGA BLO- TE 'REVIEW MEETING' NEIHPUI
content:
900/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 9th June 2026 :SIR 2026 kalpui mek zelah vawiin khan Lawngtlai District Election Officer, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruaiin DC's Office Chamber-ah Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga BLO- ten 'Review Meeting' an nei.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan SIR 2026 kalpui mekah BLO - te inpekna leh hnathawh fakawm a tih thu sawiin, Enumeration Forms semchhuah tawh dinhmun enin hna an thawk tha hle a ti a. Enumeration Forms lakkhawm leh Digitization - lamah hmasawnna tur a awm tih tarlangin, hemi kawngah hian chak zawka hnathawk turin BLO- te a chah a ni. Electors Mapping - bikah tun aia tan lak nasat a tul tih sawiin, BLO- te thahnemngai taka thawk turin a chah a ni. DEO chuan Election Commission of India (ECI) in SIR 2026 - a ngaipawimawh hle tih hriaa, ECI beisei ang taka hnathawh chhunzawm zel a tul hle tih sawiin, BLO - te an mawhphurhna tha taka hlen turin a chah nghal bawk.

Thutkhawmah hian BLO- hmalak tawhna kawng hrang hrangte sawiho a ni a. A bik takin Electors Mapped Percentage - bikah BLO thenkhatten tan an lak thar a tul hle tiin, chak zawkin hma lo la se an ti a. SIR 2026- tha taka kalpui tur leh Electoral Roll felfai, rintlak leh thianghlim nei turin BLO - an pawimawh hle tih pawm tlangin, thahnemngai taka thawh chhunzawm zel ni se an ti a ni.

Vawiin 'Review Meeting' ah hian 36- Tuichawng (ST), 37- Lawngtlai West (ST) leh 38- Lawngtlai East (ST) a ERO, AERO, bakah Lawngtlai khawpui chhunga BLO- te an telkim thei a, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

Attachment

title: SAITUAL DISTRICT-AH PMSMA KUM 10 TLIN LAWMNA HMAN A NI
content:
897/2026-2027

Saitual, the 9th June, 2026:Vawiin khan Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA) kum 10 tlin champha pualin Saitual District Hospital-ah nu naupai te pual inentirna leh zirtirna hun hman a ni.

He hun hi Dr. Zothanpari Chhakchhuak, Deputy Chief Medical Officer, Saitual District chuan kaihruaiin, kalkhawm te hnenah PMSMA hman a nih chhan leh a pawimawhna te a sawifiah a. Naupai laia inentir that a pawimawhzia tarlangin, an hriselna atana an hriat tur pawimawh hrang hrang te a hrilh bawk a ni.

He hunah hian naupai te tan a thlawn vekin inentirna buatsaih a ni a, Gynaecologist Dr. Lalduhsaka’n naupai te hriselna dinhmun a endik a, Dr. V. Lalremruata’n Ultrasound hmanga naute leh chhul dinhmun a enfiah sak bawk a ni. Naupai lo kal zawng zawng te chu BP leh Zunthlum (RBS) leh Hb te, Blood group, Hepatitis B & C bakah HIV test sak vek an ni a, an mamawh ang zela rawtna leh damdawi te pek nghal an ni.

PMSMA hi Sawrkar Laipui scheme niin thla tin ni 9-ah nau pai te tan a thlawn vekin inentirna neih thin a ni a. A tum ber chu nau pai lai a natna benvawn awm thei te hriat chhuah hma a, nu leh naute thi/hrisel lo tur venna a ni.

Saitual District Hospital chuan PMSMA kum 10 tlin lawmna pual hian naupai zawng zawng te chu thla tin inentirna hun hi lo hmang tangkai zel turin a chah a ni.

Attachment
